title: Media Contacts
description: Information for members of the media
text:
The Ames Laboratory Communications Office provides assistance to members of the media interested in contacting researchers, staff, or administrators. We can arrange interviews and photography sessions, provide background information and arrange for temporary parking permits to assist you in accessing campus and Ames Laboratory facilities. You can find us on Twitter at @AmesNatLab and on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/AmesNationalLab/.
Primary contact for media is Laura Millsaps who can be reached at millsaps@ameslab.gov or (515) 294-3474. Contact Laura to be added to the mailing list for press releases and electronic media advisories.
